articles.title: NBA votes to mull Vegas, Seattle expansion bids
articles.original_title: NBA votes to mull Vegas, Seattle expansion bids
articles.summary: The NBA's board of governors has approved a vote for the league to explore bids and applicants for expansion teams exclusively in Las Vegas and Seattle.

articles.title: Expansion may be coming to the NBA. Here's some of what you may want to know
articles.original_title: Expansion may be coming to the NBA. Here's some of what you may want to know
articles.summary: The NBA is now officially looking at expansion, with Seattle and Las Vegas the two targeted cities.  A vote Wednesday by the league's board of governors — part of a two-day series of meetings in New York — cleared the way for formal talks between potential ownership groups in those two cities and NBA officials to take place, a process that likely will start before too long.  Commissioner Adam Silver wants the league to know by the end of 2026 if expansion will happen.

articles.title: NFL will open 2026 season on a Wednesday for 2nd time ever with the champion Seahawks as host
articles.original_title: NFL will open 2026 season on a Wednesday for 2nd time ever with the champion Seahawks as host
articles.summary: The NFL will open the season on a Wednesday night for the second time ever with the defending champion Seattle Seahawks set to host the first game of the 2026 season.  The NFL announced on Wednesday that the Seahawks will play the traditional opener as Super Bowl champions on Sept. 9, a day earlier than usual with the league also having a Week 1 game in Australia between the San Francisco 49ers and Los Angeles Rams.
